established.categorical_formalization: trace-to-scheme operation defined as morphism in category TtS (objects: A1-admissible interfaces; morphisms: admissible export operations)
established.morphism_data_exhaustion: six pieces of morphism data exhaust the operation's structural specification by categorical definition
established.A1_to_gates_bijection: A1 imposes cost-payment at each piece of morphism data; cost-payments are exactly G1-G6
established.deductive_sufficiency: exhaustion follows from morphism-data structure rather than manual enumeration
established.upgrade_from_v35_3: enumeration assumption replaced by categorical-formalization assumption (definitional rather than factual-completeness)

open.categorical_uniqueness_of_TtS: show TtS is universal (initial / terminal) among categories capturing the trace-to-scheme operation
open.uniqueness_of_status_determination: each gate-availability pattern leads to exactly one named status (conjectural; nine-for-nine empirical)
open.bank_module: codify TtS, morphism-data lemma, A1-forced-gates theorem as tier-3 [P_structural] checks

joint_state_after_v35_4.necessity: v35.2 — per-gate deductive proofs from A1 + MD + BW + categorical structure
joint_state_after_v35_4.sufficiency_by_enumeration: v35.3 — six surfaces enumerated; eleven candidate G7s reduce
joint_state_after_v35_4.sufficiency_by_deduction: v35.4 — morphism-data exhaustion in TtS; A1 forces gates by data correspondence

load_bearing_assumption_now: TtS as defined captures the trace-to-scheme operation correctly (definitional question; cleaner than enumeration-completeness)
